purpose: Detailed machine-readable snapshot of the single current executable session. This complements SESSION_STATE.json rather than replacing it.

currentSession.title: Add request-batch generation command
currentSession.objective: Execute the committed music and SFX generation-request batches deterministically through an additive CLI and/or API path that uses the new typed loaders.
currentSession.whyItMatters: This is the first step that turns the newly loaded factory-input artifacts into reproducible practical output generation for the game-audio workflow.

conditionalModify.condition: only if a small compatibility hook or normalization fix is required for batch execution
only if the additive command surface is exercised there

minimum: one deterministic /tmp smoke run using the committed generation-request fixtures
additionalWhenApplicable: verify expected output files exist for at least one music and one SFX request fixture
record seed and request-id usage clearly in the handoff notes

doneCriteriaSummary: One additive CLI or API path executes at least the committed music and SFX request-batch fixtures.
Deterministic seeds remain explicit and are passed through the execution path.
Tests cover the new request-batch generation path.
Existing one-off CLI compatibility is preserved.
Affected docs describe batch generation truthfully without overstating provenance or QA automation.

nextSession.title: Write provenance + review logs per request

fixturePolicy: Use the committed example artifacts under docs/AI_FACTORY/EXAMPLES/gamerewritten_vertical_slice/ as the default fixtures.
Do not invent alternate schema examples unless the committed artifacts are insufficient and the missing case is added explicitly.
